rows.label: qst106007_msg0001
rows.name: I see, I see. So that's how it is, mo!

rows.label: qst106007_msg0002
rows.name:
How about it, Hana-san?
Do you understand, mo?

rows.label: qst106007_msg0003
rows.name:
Yes, I understand the importance
of forests very well, mo.

rows.label: qst106007_msg0004
rows.name:
Forests and trees can become
materials for homes
and furniture...

rows.label: qst106007_msg0005
rows.name: not just homes for monsters, mo.

rows.label: qst106007_msg0007
rows.name:
Forest trees help purify water
and prevent disasters like
landslides...

rows.label: qst106007_msg0008
rows.name:
They also soothe and heal
people's hearts, mo.

rows.label: qst106007_msg0009
rows.name:
Yes, mo. It feels like
scales have fallen from
Hana's eyes, mo!

rows.label: qst106007_msg0010
rows.name:
Hana-san, it seems you learned
Forestry properly, mo.

rows.label: qst106007_msg0011
rows.name:
Now for second period, mo.
Next is observation skills, mo.

rows.label: qst106007_msg0012
rows.name:
We'll take a short break, so
call me when you're ready
to resume, mo.
